notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez singles on a ground ball to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Otto Lopez to 2nd. Otto Lopez advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Kazuma Okamoto out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez hit by pitch. George Springer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Lenyn Sosa plunked
notableEvents.detail: Lenyn Sosa hit by pitch. Brandon Valenzuela to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Jakob Marsee steals (14) 2nd base. Jakob Marsee to 3rd. Jakob Marsee advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Brandon Valenzuela.

notableEvents.label: Liam Hicks GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Liam Hicks grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Lenyn Sosa. Javier Sanoja out at 2nd. Liam Hicks out at 1st.
